name: Mad World Survivors
short_description: Mad World Survivors is a fast-paced rogue-lite shooter where you battle relentless hordes of monsters in a world consumed by chaos. Players must survive intense combat where every decision could be their last
detailed_description:
Free old version on itch.io

Available at: alexander-badrak itch.io mad-world-survivors


About the Game

Mad World Survivors is a fast-paced rogue-lite shooter where you battle relentless hordes of monsters in a world consumed by chaos. Players must survive intense combat where every decision could be their last. If you enjoy quick action, unique character abilities, and ever-changing battle conditions, this game is for you!

What to expect:

  • Non-stop action with countless enemies and powerful abilities.

  • Procedurally generated runs: every attempt is unique, adding endless replayability.

  • Progression system: choose your hero and upgrade abilities.

  • Affordable price and regular updates crafted with community care.
